infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: This app uses the camera to capture selfies for AI image generation.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: This app accesses your photo library to select selfies and save generated images.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: This app saves generated images to your photo library.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow FeverDreams to access your camera to take selfies for AI image generation.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow FeverDreams to access your photos to select selfies for AI image generation.
